name: Misaka Network, Inc.
notes:
Peering sessions of **AS57695** will be gradually moved to [AS917](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/917) and we no longer accept no peering requests for **AS57695**.

We use different ASNs in these markets:

- Global - AS917

- Global (Edge) - AS57695

- EMEA - [AS35487](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/35487)

- United Kingdom - [AS58313](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/58313)

- Spain - [AS48386](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/48386)

- Italy - [AS58342](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/58342)

- Russia - [AS57578](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/57578)

- Asia - [AS23961](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/23961)

- Japan - [AS142616](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/142616)

- Customer Prefixes / BYOIP - [AS47553](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/47553)

- Office - [AS969](https://www.peeringdb.com/asn/969)
